customCommands.name: CleanupAgent
customCommands.description: Scan audit file and apply guideline cleanups
customCommands.prompt: Read AI_ASSISTANTS_IDE_INTEGRATION_AUDIT.md. Parse the list of files/tools. For each: Identify outdated workarounds (e.g., verbose hacks for old models). Suggest removals/rearrangements to coding-standards.yaml. Ensure no conflicts. Output as a step-by-step change plan.
